name: Bok Choy Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or frying pan.
2. Add salt to the vegetables (bok choy, bean sprouts, and snow peas).
3. Stir fry the mixture for 5-7 minutes until the vegetables are cooked through.
4. Mix together cornstarch, chicken bouillon powder, and sugar.
5. Add the mixture to the stir-fried vegetables.
6. Continue stirring until the dish is glazed and thickened.
